title: Automotive Telescopic Inspection Mirror Round Handle Mechanics Mirror Tool Stainless Steel Universal Folding Telescopic Round Mirror for Mechanics Cars maintenance 150-685mm 50mm Diameter
features: 360 Rotatable Mirror & Adjustable Length:You can extend the Folding Telescopic Mirror into any narrow spaces since the inspection mirror shaft up to 150-685mm, and the retractable mirror can be 360 rotatable so as to give a flexible and clear reflection.

Work For Workshop:The thin extendable shaft with rotating mirror, you can easily see into hidden parts of your engine, read a hard-to-get-to gas meter, check on fillings, or the drive belt tension indicator. Ideal for gas and electric installation worker to inspect pipework joints after soldering and check for leaks; Also useful for inspecting high up places such as the tops of boilers or tracing cable, saving getting ladders out.
Work For Home:enable you search cramped areas at home to find your lost items, check inside of your guitar or other instruments. Our the retractable folding mirror also works great for home.

Premium stainless Steel Lightweight to operate:Stainless steel shaft with comfortable foam handle and the crystal clear reflecting mirror wrapped with stainless steel are the reason of its durability. We are always dedicated to provide the best product for every customer.
Firm swivel ball joint:Our Inspection Mirror is well-built and well-priced, the connection is firm enough that the mirror doesn't flop around and the handle is soft to grasp.
